offer: For restaurant managers overseeing 5–15 staff members, inefficient onboarding causes high turnover rates. We simplify training processes instead of manual training sessions and outdated onboarding materials.
problem: Inefficient onboarding and training processes for new restaurant staff.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Indie Hackers discussions on onboarding challenges
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for restaurant management
try_it: Let users try step-by-step training guides and onboarding checklists
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with one-liner
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Allow CSV import for existing staff data
Enable one-click export of onboarding reports
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
